text: Moving from the quiet, sterile corridor into this vibrant, idea-filled space, I feel a sense of anticipated discovery. The world here is dedicated to research and development, and the colorful displays spark my curiosity. There is a feeling of being welcomed into a collective mind devoted to progress, to questioning, and to the pursuit of knowledge. I feel invigorated, eager to explore the conversations and technologies emerging in this room, and mindful of my small place within this larger human endeavor.
